channel.title: git on Vikas's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in git on Vikas's Blog

item.title: Remove Submodule From Git
item.description: In order to remove a submodule from git, you need to follow the below 4 steps. Delete the relevant line from the .gitmodules file. Delete the relevant section from .git/config. Run git rm --cached path_to_submodule (no trailing slash). Commit and delete the now untracked submodule files. Example In my blog repo, I was trying multiple different themes and so had added a ton of submodules. Here is .gitmodules file.
